targets.rawSql: SELECT date_bin('1 hour', time) AS time, source, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'ok' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / COUNT(*) AS success_rate FROM api_fetch WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1, source ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_bin('1 hour', time) AS time, error, COUNT(*) AS count FROM api_fetch WHERE outcome = 'fail' AND time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1, error ORDER BY 1
SELECT zone, COUNT(*) AS count FROM api_fetch WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY zone ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT date_bin('1 hour', time) AS time, COUNT(*) AS count FROM api_fetch WHERE outcome = 'fail' AND time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT source, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'ok' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ok, SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail, ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN outcome = 'ok' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOUBLE) / COUNT(*) * 100, 1) AS success_pct FROM api_fetch WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY source ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT date_bin('1 hour', time) AS time, device, outcome, COUNT(*) AS count FROM api_fetch WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1, device, outcome ORDER BY 1
SELECT app, COUNT(*) AS count FROM api_fetch WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY app ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN lang = '' THEN 'system' ELSE lang END AS language, COUNT(DISTINCT date_bin('1 day', time)) AS days FROM api_fetch WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo AND lang IS NOT NULL GROUP BY lang ORDER BY days DESC
SELECT status, COUNT(DISTINCT date_bin('1 day', time)) AS days FROM api_fetch WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo AND status IS NOT NULL GROUP BY status ORDER BY days DESC

SELECT date_bin('1 hour', time) AS time, source, APPROX_PERCENTILE_CONT(duration_ms, 0.5) AS p50, APPROX_PERCENTILE_CONT(duration_ms, 0.95) AS p95 FROM api_fetch WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo AND duration_ms > 0 GROUP BY 1, source ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_bin('1 hour', time) AS time, outcome, APPROX_PERCENTILE_CONT(duration_ms, 0.5) AS p50, APPROX_PERCENTILE_CONT(duration_ms, 0.95) AS p95 FROM api_fetch WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo AND duration_ms > 0 GROUP BY 1, outcome ORDER BY 1
